name: MediaPipe Face Overlay
description: Manual-wire template for the MediaPipe face-landmark look (face mesh dots drawn over a live video source). Mirrors the topology that setup_face_tracking (v0.8.1) builds at the tool level: a video background, an adapter Script CHOP fed by the MediaPipe engine's face JSON DAT, instanced dots from the 468 landmarks composited on top, then a final tint. Point 'facein' Select CHOP at the adapter CHOP from `tdmcp install mediapipe-touchdesigner` + setup_face_tracking. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live cook-check UNVERIFIED pending TD run.

nodes.name: videoin
nodes.comment: Webcam background. macOS will prompt for camera permission on first cook.

nodes.name: bg_level
nodes.comment: Dim the camera so the landmark dots read on top.

nodes.name: facein
nodes.comment: Set 'chops' to /project1/mp_face_adapter/face (the adapter CHOP setup_face_tracking builds). 468 samples × tx/ty/tz/confidence.

nodes.name: dot
nodes.comment: Single dot SOP — copied per landmark via instancing on the geometryCOMP.

nodes.name: render
nodes.comment: Transparent background so the dot cloud composites over videoin.

nodes.name: overlay
nodes.comment: Face mesh dots composited over the dimmed webcam.

preview_description: A dimmed webcam frame of a face with a cyan-green dot cloud (one dot per MediaPipe face landmark) tracking the eyes, brows, nose and mouth contours in real time.
